segments.text: Today we are going to have Guru Puja.
I am supposed be your guru,
but i feel sometimes that the idea of a guru
is very different from mine
Normally A guru
Is Very-very strict person
and has no patience of any kind
Even say music
There are gurus who teach music in India, so all the disciplines have to be absolutely
followed.
I know about this great musician Ravishankar we had been here where he came and my father
was very much respected by his guru Galaudin Ghazan.
So He asked him why don't you play something?
So he didn't tell him anything that time.
Then He showed a big bump here,
and said Sir do you see this?
And what My own Tanpura broke on my head
because I was little bit out of tune
otherwise she wasn' t very nice man
i must say
but when it came to teaching
tradition I think
that you have to
put all kinds of disciplines on the
students.
But still,the student stick onto the Guru they look after it-all their time
They are bothered if the guru wants this thing
then run and she wants these things will do and guru goes one taking
different
types
tests
The disciple like Shivaji's guru asked him
That I would like to drink
the milk of a tigress.
So he said, all right if my guru has said it is his look out
so went to forest and I saw a tigress sitting there
she had already finished giving me her cups
He bowed before the tigress
And i said see
My Guru wants your Milk
Will you please give some milk for my Guru
And the tigress understood it, she stood up and he took out
The milk of the tigress for the guru.
So in this one can see that
In obedience to the Guru
One achieves even impossible things
Another time his guru said
That He has got a big boil on His neck
It is all ripe
And anybody who will suck it, she has to be My disciple and my disciple when he sucks
It I'll do all right.
Everybody was so averse To A thing like that Shivaji Maharaj said of course i will
Suckit.
He bent down an started sucking from the bandage That Was There An it was a mango
So there are two, three types of tests are all the time taken
after disciple. Firstly how much they obey you
but as You have got Realization
and Your are your own gurus
I don't put that condition on it
I leave it to your freedom.
And tell you earnestly in all the way possible
what i think good for You
but,I don't compel like these gurus used do
I mean they use beat
They is hang them on a well
There were so very strict with their disciples
and have had an experience of this
there never used smile
no question laughing
and would never show any kind of weakness,
or kindness for the disciples.
This is about spiritual gurus I am telling you
but those who wanted their ascent
Wanted there realization
Would go on passing through all kinds
Of tortures that they put in them
Some of the gurus didn't like some disciples
They would tell them, all right you'd now stand on your one leg all the time.
So they're standing with their legs like a crane and in other words
there was say that we'll stay on our head
The way used to treat
Their disciples
Was rather difficult for me
I can't do it
All of this time
Your compassion becomes the tears in My eyes, I find it impossible.
May just say that sometimes also said a way looks like little scolding but to be mother
and guru is most difficult thing .I do not know what comes first ,but of course every
And the Holy Mother wants Her child to be good, and the Holy Mother
want's her child
To Be a holy person.
The first thing is the holiness
Now for that how can you compel someone?
Only think
That makes You understand
Is this
If if don't become holy
How will get your ascent
We have to be holy.
What discipline one can put for making a person holy?
what you force,
or get angry about
The only method I use normally is to forgive
Maybe the forgiveness
Is highest quality
For teaching people
When they know that
They've done wrong and they confess it
Then You'll have to forgive
Like in the life of Buddha
There was a man who was abusing him without understanding and when he finished with his
abuses, Buddha had left.
People told Him do you know whom You were abusing?
It was Lord Buddha got afraid of His life said where is He gone?
He's going to another village so went into the other village
I am sorry, but i said please forgive me. It's all wrong and
And should not have done it you can punish Me the way You like
Lord Buddha said when did He do that?
he Said yesterday
He said-I don't know Yesterday
I only today see even if anew tell these things how great one feels in
So your greatness your nobility will definitely infuse people
It's not by fighting, by quarreling
By saying harsh things it is going to work out.
Also the gurus used control
The children very much
The disciples very much
Absolutely controlled
You have get up at four o'clock
Sit down for meditation
If you had got up they would beat
I can't understand
Sahaja Yoga is different
And from all other gurus that we believe in the power of love.
Power of Love teaches you how to be forgiving, it makes noble and very balanced so the gurus
who were there for bhavasagara established dharma into human beings first thing they
to balance themselves against all practical things, as they call it.
They think is not practical but
said no for us this higher, nobler and important
so that would balance people because
had the power of love within themself
All these are gurus and their incarnations if you see
They always had balance and always praised the love of God.
When we talk about realization, one has to know first
that all have patience with ourselves
I know some people don't feel so good
Some still have sicknesses
Some people don't even feel vibrations sometimes.
Have patience with yourself!
When you become your own guru, first thing
as the Guru has patients
–with his or her disciple–
You must have patience with yourselves
In that patience
we will learn
That
We can tolerate
so many things without any trouble
Let's say one person
who goes on grudging, oh this is not good that it's not good because they have no patience
with themselves.
If you are patient yourself everything will accept wherever your are you're with
yourselves cause we realize souls so won't frustrate to get angry and also go on crumbling
and grudging, because you are enjoying yourself.
Even if there's a mattress or right –if they're isn't–you can sleep on the grass
with no grass we'll just sleep in the stove!
And also need not to slip like last night makes no difference whatsoever.
The first thing I find is people have no patience for themselves firstly maybe
because they are conditioned.
Say, if you have a left Vishuddhi
by any chance that
You've been Catholic or TM
then all the time
start pitying yourself
thinking no end of your miseries
and troubles
always try to condemn yourselves
You're a realized soul
And there is no business
like person who's getting drowned
has being saved
has come to the show, now he's living nicely.
He got his second life and there
is still trying
To express this agony as if it was getting drowned
So you have to awaken yourself
No no more I am here
I'm finished
Gone Now
And different
That for somebody else
Am not same person
This how
Now, you have to tell yourself very clearly that I am not going to condemn myself.
It was your right get Self-realization – You got it!
And then…you cannot enjoy because of these conditionings especially in the West
To be miserable is fashionable
There are miseries for people who know miseries
These all people from where?
So, for such people who have imaginary miseries of the past which do not exist in reality
they cannot have joy or reality.
They can't!
so a Sahaja Yogi is important that he should enjoy within his heart
It's like an ocean, it is there all the time to give you such thrills even little drops
of this Ocean when they trickle down in your being.
It is so soothing, the experience can be only experienced.
But it's all waiting within yourself
and such a person also makes others' joys
he cannot see another person unhappy in trouble
himself his full of joy
And spreads Joy around
You get Joy from small-small things
Because you have the ocean and a little thing that drops into
The Ocean creates such beautiful ripples.
They touch the shores, not only of your own being but
Of others very-very small things make
You so happy
And all time
We are just like surfing as they call it these days
On this beautiful lake or a beautiful ocean
of love.
Love is joy-giving, it's not carnal love – It Is Divine Love!
So as Sahaja Yogis and as Gurus we have to love ourselves
And understand our own value I think Sahajogies
Have Not yet understood their value How many people in this world can give
realization?
How many know about Kundalini?
how may have seen people being resurrected all the time.
You are made so powerful that even looking at
People you can give realization
In ordinary love, in carnal Love
People fear
They're afraid
That their beloved might depart
or might get sick, might happen this and they
may be all the time under fear.
Resist enjoying but for you are with yourself
And your always protected if
Your attention is bad
For a second even immediately
You know you're going wrong
You protect yourselves from yourself
As soon as
to get some physical problem, you can feel it.
You know how cure yourself but again one has
have balance if your off the balance then
don't even fee vibrations
Don' t even feel what's wrong with
u
U do not know which direction ur moving
whether u are getting destroyed and this
The imbalance has to be established by all the Sahaja Yogis.
These imbalances come towards us because we still think about our past or maybe
of out future, you worry these things?
What is there for worrying when all the angles and all the ganas are working for
You?
You just have to order, that's all.
Much like sometimes a person is made king
and he was put on the throne before it was a beggar
so anybody who comes to bow down before him
says alright give me one pound
you've got know
That your are all realized souls
And then we get all powers within us
Only thing which very important

people who are say afraid of these worldly laws they don't know there's such a powerful
energy all around you, nothing can stop it.
Nothing can arrest You and find faults
but when we start doubting like yesterday's doubting
When We say But
When we think about the man-made laws
then God's laws fail
otherwise nobody punishes us
Nobody can arrest you, nobody can do anything to
You. You are absolutely protected."
So the main difference between
The old style of Guru
and modern style of guru is this
that
Old gurus used say
,you must suffer all right
Got to be arrested it's very good
If they give poison take the poison
if They want to slap you
Take slaps
Whatever they want to do, you should accept because it's your suffering.
Not in Sahaja Yoga
Because Your Mother is sitting here
How dare anybody touch You?
No one can harm Me
–you have believe me when I say that–
no-one could harm but
we must had faith within yourself
Nobody has Adi Shakti as the Guru
Adishakti was all powers of the world
So who can harm You?
Who can torture You
Who can trouble you except for yourself if want to torture your self, nobody can help.
So the greatest difference between this disciple of other gurus and Yourself is that You don't

mother my heart is catching. My this is catching that is catching

kundalini moves
whatever you may be

they suffer from also arthritis

it's alright in protocol if we don't understand

Because the area where you are is safe, but if you want to get out of that

your captured into it. That's not a mistake of Sahaja Yoga
To find fault with Sahajogis or with Sahaja Yoga
It's another mistake, we commit some time.
Say if there are ten disciples with a guru – very good excellent gurus–if they complain
about any one of them immediately the guru will say you get out!
They have no business to complain about each other on the contrary like this hand
is paining, then this hand doesn't complain to the brain but tries

who belong in a group
as described by Gyaneshwara that you move
now like an enlightened forest
which gives whatever people want
to have Kalpataru's and he says
Because you move like oceans and talk about God.

You saw yesterday in drama how a

An all of u move in a group
Together with One understanding
Such a powerful group it is
They bring Ambrosia
To the people according to Gyaneshwara

for a person. Those who cannot be collective are not its Sahaja Yogis

get angry with other's, shout at them
tell their work do all kinds of things.

otherwise your'e NOT a Sahajyogi
